title: fix: stop news content leaking into main
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Plugging the news leak
gist.blurb: Cleaned up the repository by stopping our automated news pipeline from accidentally spilling its generated files into the main branch.
gist.summary: Fixed a GitHub Actions workflow to prevent generated social media content from leaking into the main branch and removed previously leaked files.
gist.impact: Keeps the main repository branch clean and focused solely on source code.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot sweeping up a massive pile of newspapers or polaroid photos that spilled out of a pipe, representing the cleanup of the leaked social media files.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot using a tiny broom to sweep up a massive pile of pixelated newspapers and polaroid photos that spilled out of a lime green (#ecf874) pipe. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
